body:

title: Remove nsys report from gpu_aquaplanet_dyamond

body:
While `insolation_tuple` seems to be currently used only in one function, it is stored in the cache and available everywhere. For spheres, `insolation_tuple` was updated in the radiation callback, but that was not the case for other configurations. This commit ensures that `insolation_tuple` is always updated. For non-spheres, we assume insolation at Greenwhich (lat = long = 0).

This commit also unifies a little bit the logic between the two cases (with and without sphere).

@szy21 could you double-check that my code rearrangement is valid? I think that the two branches of the if statement share most of the logic, but they are written slightly differently and I don't think the field2array should matter in this case

Closes #3356 #3355
title: Update insolation_tuple for boxes too

body: This PR enables MPI tests for restarts and changes a little bit the structure of the restart test. I changed the order of things because I need to add more complex cases, but I don't want to add more nesting levels. Now, I can push more tests to the test dict directly.
title: Reorganize restart tests
